title: Fix parameterized class typedef as interface type parameter (#7000)
body:
Fixes #7000

## Summary

Fix resolution of parameterized class typedefs when used as interface type parameters.
Issues #5461 and #5977 were already fixed upstream, so this PR now focuses solely on #7000.

When a DOT expression like `X::td_t` is processed in `resolveDotToTypedef()`, `X` may point
to a `ParamTypeDType` (the interface's type parameter) whose value contains a `ClassRefDType`.
The existing code only checked `classRefp->paramsp()` for specialization, missing the
indirection through the type parameter.

### Pattern fixed
```systemverilog
class C #(parameter type T = logic);
  typedef struct packed { T data; } td_t;
endclass

interface outer #(parameter type X = C#(logic));
  inner #(.P(X::td_t)) i();  // was: Can't find typedef: 'td_t'
endinterface

module top;
  outer #(.X(C#(logic[7:0]))) inst();  // now works
endmodule
```

### Changes

- **V3Param.cpp**: `resolveDotToTypedef()` ŌĆö handle `ParamTypeDType` targets by traversing
  to the underlying `ClassRefDType` and calling `classRefDeparam()` to specialize the class
- **V3Param.cpp**: `resolveParamClassRefDType()` ŌĆö new helper to resolve deferred `RefDType`
  nodes through parameterized class typedef chains; called from `cellPinCleanup()` for both
  value and type parameter pins
- **V3Param.cpp**: `cellPinCleanup()` ŌĆö deparameterize `ClassRefDType` type parameter
  expressions before comparison and name generation
- **V3AstNodeDType.h** / **V3AstNodes.cpp**: `AstClassRefDType::similarDTypeNode()` ŌĆö moved
  out-of-line and extended to compare type parameter lists using `similarDType` (not `sameTree`)

### Test

`t_iface_param_class_type[_noinl]` ŌĆö exercises 1-level and 2-level interface nesting,
default type parameters, and multiple type parameters accessing different typedefs from
the same parameterized class.
